tools.name: kit/clipboard_clear_unpinned
tools.description: Clear all unpinned clipboard-history entries. Requires confirm:true.

tools.name: kit/clipboard_copy
tools.description: Copy a clipboard-history entry to the system clipboard by entry id.

tools.name: kit/clipboard_delete
tools.description: Delete a clipboard-history entry by entry id. Requires confirm:true.

tools.name: kit/clipboard_pin
tools.description: Pin a clipboard-history entry by entry id.

tools.name: kit/clipboard_unpin
tools.description: Unpin a clipboard-history entry by entry id.

tools.name: kit/config_get
tools.description: Read Script Kit config.ts, optionally by dot-path key.

tools.name: kit/config_list
tools.description: List supported Script Kit config keys with current/default values.

tools.name: kit/config_remove_command_shortcut
tools.description: Remove a launcher command shortcut from Script Kit config.ts with confirm:true.

tools.name: kit/config_reset
tools.description: Reset one Script Kit config key, or the entire config, with confirm:true.

tools.name: kit/config_set
tools.description: Set a Script Kit config.ts key to a JSON-compatible value.

tools.name: kit/config_set_command_shortcut
tools.description: Set a launcher command shortcut in Script Kit config.ts.

tools.name: kit/config_validate
tools.description: Validate the current Script Kit config.ts file.

tools.name: kit/config_validate_change
tools.description: Validate a proposed Script Kit config key/value change without writing.

tools.name: kit/notes_create
tools.description: Create a Script Kit note and optionally open/select it in the Notes window.

id.description: Optional UUID. Omit to generate one.

tags.description: Optional tags to merge into visible note frontmatter.

aliases.description: Optional aliases to merge into visible note frontmatter.

tools.name: kit/notes_delete
tools.description: Delete a Script Kit note. Soft delete by default; permanent deletion requires permanent=true and confirm=true.

tools.name: kit/notes_update
tools.description: Update a Script Kit note by id and optionally open/select it in the Notes window.

tags.description: Optional tags to merge into visible note frontmatter.

aliases.description: Optional aliases to merge into visible note frontmatter.

tools.name: kit/scripts_create
tools.description: Create a TypeScript script under ~/.scriptkit/plugins/main/scripts.

name.description: Script filename stem. Sanitized like Script Kit's New Script flow.

tools.name: kit/scripts_delete
tools.description: Delete a TypeScript script from ~/.scriptkit/plugins/main/scripts. Requires confirm:true.

tools.name: kit/scripts_run
tools.description: Run a TypeScript script from ~/.scriptkit/plugins/main/scripts with Bun and return stdout/stderr/exit status.

tools.name: kit/scripts_update
tools.description: Replace an existing TypeScript script under ~/.scriptkit/plugins/main/scripts.

tools.name: kit/show
tools.description: Show the Script Kit window

tools.name: kit/hide
tools.description: Hide the Script Kit window

tools.name: kit/state
tools.description: Get current Script Kit app state

tools.name: kit/trigger_builtin
tools.description: Trigger a Script Kit built-in command by canonical builtinId or deprecated legacy name using the same runtime dispatcher as stdin triggerBuiltin.

name.description: Deprecated legacy builtin alias. Prefer builtinId.

tools.name: computer/see
tools.description: Inspect a Script Kit automation window and return a state-first computer-use observation.

target.description: AutomationWindowTarget. Omit to use the focused automation window.

tools.name: computer/list_windows
tools.description: List registered Script Kit automation windows without interacting with them.

tools.name: computer/get_window
tools.description: Return one registered Script Kit automation window by stable automation window id without screenshots, native focus changes, or runtime inspection.

tools.name: computer/get_focused_window
tools.description: Return the focused Script Kit automation window from the automation registry without screenshots, native focus changes, or runtime inspection.

tools.name: computer/list_apps
tools.description: List running GUI applications without launching, quitting, focusing, hiding, or sending input.

includeBackground.description: Include accessory, prohibited, and unknown background applications in addition to regular GUI apps.

tools.name: computer/get_app
tools.description: Return one running GUI application by PID without launching, quitting, focusing, hiding, or sending input.

tools.name: computer/list_apps_by_bundle_id
tools.description: List currently running GUI applications matching an exact bundle id without launching, quitting, focusing, hiding, or sending input.

bundleId.description: Exact bundle identifier for currently running GUI applications, e.g. com.apple.Terminal.

tools.name: computer/list_app_windows
tools.description: List native windows for one running GUI application by PID without focusing, moving, resizing, or capturing screenshots.

tools.name: computer/list_app_windows_by_bundle_id
tools.description: List native windows for every running GUI application matching an exact bundle id without focusing, activating, launching, quitting, hiding, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, or sending input.

bundleId.description: Exact bundle identifier for a currently running GUI application, e.g. com.apple.Terminal.

tools.name: computer/get_app_window_by_bundle_id
tools.description: Return one native window owned by a currently running GUI application matching an exact bundle id and CoreGraphics window id without focusing, activating, launching, quitting, hiding, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, or sending input.

bundleId.description: Exact bundle identifier for a currently running GUI application, e.g. com.apple.Terminal.

nativeWindowId.description: CoreGraphics native window id to look up within currently running apps matching bundleId.

tools.name: computer/capture_native_window
tools.description: Capture a PNG screenshot of one exact native macOS window after PID, nativeWindowId, optional bundle-id ownership, and capture-candidate revalidation. Does not focus, activate, move, resize, click, type, request permissions, or fall back to another window.

pid.description: Owner process id from computer/list_app_windows or computer/list_native_windows.

nativeWindowId.description: Moment-in-time CoreGraphics native window id to capture.

hiDpi.description: Return native Retina pixels when true; otherwise downscale through the existing screenshot path.

includeImage.description: Include pngBase64 in the JSON receipt. When false, return only dimensions, SHA-256, and pixel audit.

expectedBundleId.description: Optional exact bundle-id guard. Capture is refused if pid no longer belongs to this bundle.

tools.name: computer/capture_render_window
tools.description: Capture app-rendered GPUI pixels for one resolved Script Kit automation window from inside the live runtime. Does not focus, activate, move, resize, click, type, request permissions, or use macOS WindowServer screenshot capture. This does not prove macOS WindowServer compositor/native blur output.

target.description: AutomationWindowTarget. Omit to use the focused automation window where the caller schema allows omission.

hiDpi.description: Return high-DPI app-render pixels when the runtime readback path supports them.

includeImage.description: Include pngBase64 in the JSON receipt. When false, return only dimensions, SHA-256, and pixel audit.

tools.name: computer/list_native_windows
tools.description: List native windows grouped by running GUI application without focusing, activating, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, or sending input.

includeBackground.description: Include accessory, prohibited, and unknown background applications in addition to regular GUI apps.

tools.name: computer/get_native_window
tools.description: Return one native window by CoreGraphics window id across running GUI applications without focusing, activating, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, or sending input.

tools.name: computer/get_app_window
tools.description: Return one native window for one running GUI application by PID and CoreGraphics window id without focusing, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, or sending input.

tools.name: computer/get_frontmost_native_window
tools.description: Return the current frontmost app's top native window without focusing, activating, launching, quitting, hiding, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, inspecting AX elements, requesting permissions, enumerating menu extras, exposing action handles, or sending input.

tools.name: computer/list_frontmost_app_windows
tools.description: List the current frontmost app's native windows without focusing, activating, launching, quitting, hiding, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, inspecting AX elements, requesting permissions, enumerating menu extras, exposing action handles, or sending input.

tools.name: computer/get_frontmost_app_window
tools.description: Return one native window from the current frontmost app by CoreGraphics window id without focusing, activating, launching, quitting, hiding, moving, resizing, capturing screenshots, inspecting AX elements, requesting permissions, enumerating menu extras, exposing action handles, or sending input.

nativeWindowId.description: CoreGraphics native window id from computer/list_frontmost_app_windows.

tools.name: computer/get_frontmost_app
tools.description: Return the last tracked non-Script-Kit frontmost app from the frontmost app tracker cache without refreshing, focusing, activating, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/list_menus
tools.description: List cached menu items for the last tracked real application without refreshing, focusing, clicking, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/list_menu_item_paths
tools.description: List flattened cached menu item paths and zero-based index paths without refreshing menus, focusing apps, clicking, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/get_menu_item
tools.description: Return one cached menu item by exact title path without refreshing menus, focusing apps, clicking, or requesting permissions.

path.description: Exact cached menu title path, e.g. ["File", "New Window"]. Call computer/list_menus first.

tools.name: computer/get_menu_item_by_index_path
tools.description: Return one cached menu item by zero-based recursive index path without refreshing menus, focusing apps, clicking, or requesting permissions.

indexPath.description: Zero-based recursive index path. Use indexPath from computer/list_menu_item_paths, or derive the same position from computer/list_menus.

tools.name: computer/list_tray_menu
tools.description: List Script Kit's own tray menu model without opening the menu, clicking status items, invoking actions, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/get_tray_menu_item
tools.description: Return one Script Kit tray menu item by section and item index without opening the menu, clicking status items, invoking actions, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/get_tray_menu_item_by_id
tools.description: Return one Script Kit tray menu item by stable tray item id without opening the menu, clicking status items, invoking actions, or requesting permissions.

id.description: Stable tray menu item id from computer/list_tray_menu.

tools.name: computer/list_screens
tools.description: List attached screens/displays without moving windows, changing screen placement, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/get_screen
tools.description: Return one attached screen/display by CoreGraphics display id without moving windows, changing screen placement, capturing screenshots, or requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/list_permissions
tools.description: List read-only macOS permission status for Script Kit computer-use features without requesting permissions.

tools.name: computer/get_permission
tools.description: Return one read-only macOS permission status by permission id without requesting permissions, opening settings, synthesizing events, or mutating app/window state.
